creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tried to rebase you patch for 4.11.1 (the version in the ports tree ATM), but it does not produce a Python module anymore, because it has been deactivated:

  # enable this once we have worked out the path issues on the build machines
  if(0 AND ENABLE_BUILD_DYNAMIC)

I'll try to upgrade GMSH to the latest release, and check if it has been resolved.
